name: Opto Trem
explanation: An optical stereo tremolo: a low-frequency oscillator drives a smoothed photocell-style gain cell, modelling the gentle lag of a light-dependent resistor so even hard shapes pulse musically. Shape selects the LFO contour (sine, triangle, square or ramp), Rate and Depth set the throb, and Stereo morphs from a mono tremolo to an auto-pan where the L/R cells run in anti-phase to sweep the image side to side. Clean amplitude modulation with no distortion. Controls: Rate, Depth, Shape, Stereo and Mix.
